label: Ollama Chat
description: Chat with a local language model powered by Ollama

requirements.name: Ollama
requirements.description: Local Ollama service must be running on http://localhost:11434
requirements.instructions:
1. Download and install Ollama from https://ollama.ai
2. Run 'ollama serve' in terminal
3. In another terminal, pull a model: 'ollama pull mistral' or 'ollama pull neural-chat'
